# PPT Outline Reference: Slide Image Descriptions

This reference is used by the `ppt-outline` skill to write high-quality per-slide “配图描述”。

## Goals

- The image must reinforce the slide message (not generic decoration).
- The description must be detailed enough for image generation without needing extra context.
- Keep it brand/industry-neutral unless user specifies a style.

## Image Description Checklist

Write the description as a small structured list (recommended fields):

- 画面主体：主要对象是什么（人/物/系统/抽象图形）
- 场景/环境：在什么空间/背景中（工厂/会议室/抽象渐变/白底）
- 构图/镜头：俯视/平视/近景/广角/三分法/留白
- 风格/质感：扁平插画/等距 3D/写实摄影/信息图风
- 关键细节：颜色关系、关键道具、数据元素、对比关系
- 画面文字（如需）：只写极少量短词（可留空）
- 避免事项（可选）：不出现 logo/水印/文字过多/手指畸形等

## Common Slide-to-Image Patterns

### 1) “框架/方法论”页

- Use an abstract diagram-style image: layered blocks, three columns, flow arrows.
- Keep text inside image minimal; rely on slide bullets.

### 2) “流程/管线”页

- Use a left-to-right pipeline graphic with 4–6 stages.
- Add subtle icons per stage (document/search/brain/check/rocket).

### 3) “对比/现状 vs 目标”页

- Split-screen composition: left “messy/manual”, right “clean/automated”.
- Use consistent objects to show transformation.

### 4) “结果/指标”页

- Use a minimalist infographic: bars/line chart as visual metaphor (not literal numbers unless provided).
- Emphasize upward trend and clarity.

## Text Brevity Rules (on-slide content)

- Prefer bullets over paragraphs.
- One idea per bullet.
- If a bullet exceeds one line, split it.
